      from collections import defaultdict
  
      subj_phrases = defaultdict(list)
      for t in triples:
          s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object
  
          # Generate phrase for this triple
          phrase = generate_phrase(s, p, o)
          subj_phrases[s].append(phrase)
  
      # Build one complex sentence from all subjects
      all_phrases = []

              all_phrases.append(f"{subj} {phrases[0]}")
          elif len(phrases) == 2:
              all_phrases.append(f"{subj} {phrases[0]}, and {phrases[1]}")
          else:
              # Create relative clauses for better flow

              last = f"and {phrases[-1]}"
